title: Assistant Store Manager - Nippon Paint Store - Apply Now

jsonLd.title: Assistant Store Manager - Nippon Paint Store - Apply Now
jsonLd.description:
We at Nippon Paint Store are looking for an experienced Assistant Store Manager based out of Patna. If you are a result-oriented professional with a passion for excellence, we want to hear from you.

About Nippon Paint Store:
Nippon Paint Store is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Coordinate with the supply chain team for timely stock delivery
• Prepare daily sales reports and share insights with management
• Monitor inventory levels and coordinate replenishment activities
• Handle customer queries, complaints, and escalations effectively
• Ensure compliance with company policies and retail regulations
• Train and motivate the sales team to deliver excellent service
• Ensure visual merchandising standards are maintained at all times

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• BPharm / MPharm / PharmD
• 12-20 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Team Leadership
• Proficiency in Loss Prevention
• Proficiency in Loyalty Programs
• Proficiency in MS Excel
• Proficiency in Planogram
• Proficiency in Retail Analytics
• Proficiency in Customer Service
• Proficiency in POS Systems

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Referral bonus program
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Life and accident insurance
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Salary Range: 35 LPA - 70 LPA per annum

Location: Patna, Bihar, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Nippon Paint Store!
